name: czgameframe_constructor
description: CZGameFrame::Constructor constructs the CFrameWnd base, initializes the owned bitmap slot, installs the frame vtable, initializes log files, initializes zVideo, and returns this.
known_limits: VC5SP3 11.00.7022 /O2 /Ob1 /GX /Zp4 /DUINT_PTR=UINT COFF byte compare fails with 43 unmasked mismatches after masking 18 relocation bytes; Binary Ninja body is 54 bytes and the VC object body is 80 bytes with 13 trailing VC NOPs trimmed.
The reviewed failure is constructor/base-class setup, vtable store ordering, and call setup drift across CFrameWnd, RecoilApp::InitStdLogFiles, and zVideo::ModuleInit.
The native smoke verifies the returned this pointer, installed frame vtable/runtime identity, initialized bitmap vtable/object slot, and constructor call path with null appId.
